name: Dime Community Bancshares, Inc. /NY/
summary: PARTI General Dime Community Bancshares, Inc. (the Company) is engaged in commercial banking and financial services through its wholly-owned subsidiary, Dime Community Bank (the Bank). The Bank was established in 1910 and is headquartered in Hauppauge, New York. The Company was incorporated under the laws of the State of New York in 1988 to serve as the holding company for the Bank. The Company functions primarily as the holder of all of the Banks common stock. Our bank operations also include D...
